meta.title: StoreKite — AI-Powered E-Commerce Store Builder
meta.description: We build complete AI-powered WooCommerce stores with server-side tracking, headless Nuxt frontend, and AI content pipeline. Catch every conversion signal.

announcement.text: Now accepting new projects for Q2

hero.subtitle: Complete AI-powered WooCommerce stores — headless Nuxt frontend, server-side tracking, AI content pipeline. Built in weeks, not months.
hero.proof: No lock-in · Full build in 4–8 weeks · MCP-powered WordPress management

strip.label4: month 1 retainer typically pays for itself

problem.label: The problem
problem.subtitle: Three invisible leaks drain your ad budget every day. Most WooCommerce stores have all three.
problem.savingsDesc: Estimated monthly loss for a store spending €10k/month on ads — from tracking gaps alone.
problem.card0_desc: iPhone purchases vanish before reaching Meta ML — your campaigns optimise on a fraction of actual buyers.
problem.card1_desc: Over a third of Polish internet users run adblockers. Every one of them is invisible to Google Ads' Smart Bidding.
problem.card2_desc: Typical WooCommerce scores 40–60 on mobile. You pay 20–40% more per click than you should.

services.label: What we build
services.title: Three layers. One complete store.
services.subtitle: StoreKite wraps your WooCommerce with infrastructure that makes your store faster, smarter, and trackable.

tracking.name: Tracking
tracking.title: GA4 + GTM done right
tracking.description: Server-side tagging runs on our infrastructure. iOS, adblockers, GDPR — none of them touch your conversion data.

performance.name: Performance
performance.title: PageSpeed 95+ mobile
performance.description: Nuxt 3 headless frontend on Vercel edge. Cheaper clicks, better Quality Score, faster checkout.

ai.name: AI Content
ai.title: Blog on autopilot
ai.description: SEO articles, social drafts, email campaigns — AI-generated, you approve before publishing.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.title: From zero to live in 4–8 weeks.
timeline.subtitle: Clear milestones, no surprises. You know exactly where we are at every step.
timeline.week0_description: Store audit, design system, WordPress backend setup, GA4/GTM configuration, project architecture.
timeline.week1_description: Nuxt 3 frontend development, product catalog, checkout flow, payment integration, server-side tracking.
timeline.week2_description: AI content pipeline setup, blog automation, social media integration, email flows in Klaviyo.
timeline.week3_description: QA testing, performance optimization, DNS migration, monitoring setup, handover documentation.

roi.label: ROI Calculator
roi.title: See what better tracking is worth.
roi.subtitle: Enter your monthly revenue. We'll show the projected impact of proper attribution and AI content.
roi.trackingDesc: Better ML signal → smarter ad spend → more attributed conversions
roi.contentDesc: SEO blog traffic + email automation → organic revenue growth
roi.disclaimer: * Projections based on industry benchmarks. Tracking uplift assumes 15-25% improvement in attribution leading to better ad optimization. Content uplift assumes 3-5% organic revenue growth from consistent SEO content. Individual results vary.

testimonial.label: Social proof
testimonial.quote: I built StoreKite for my own store first. Then decided to offer it to others. Every tool in this stack is something I built, tested on my own ad budget, and rely on myself.
testimonial.name: Szymon Bubała

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions we hear often.
faq.item0_a: We build complete AI-powered WooCommerce stores — headless Nuxt 3 frontend, automated GA4/GTM tracking, AI content pipeline (blog, social, email), and MCP-powered WordPress management. It's a full store build, not just tracking consulting.
faq.item1_q: How is this different from a regular agency?
faq.item1_a: Regular agencies take 3–6 months and skip tracking infrastructure. We deliver in 4–8 weeks with enterprise-grade server-side tracking, AI content automation, and MCP-powered WordPress management built in from day one.
faq.item2_q: Do I need to migrate from my current store?
faq.item2_a: Yes — we build a new headless frontend on Nuxt 3 while keeping your WooCommerce backend. Your products, orders, and customers stay in WordPress. The frontend gets a complete rebuild for performance and tracking.
faq.item3_a: We handle 301 redirects, canonical URLs, structured data, and sitemap generation. Most stores see improved rankings within weeks thanks to Core Web Vitals improvements.
faq.item4_q: How many projects do you take per year?
faq.item4_a: 5–8 projects maximum. Each store gets dedicated attention — no assembly line, no junior devs. When we're full, we're full.
faq.item5_q: What does the AI content pipeline actually do?
faq.item5_a: It generates SEO blog articles, social media drafts, and email campaigns based on your products and brand voice. You review and approve before publishing. It's not auto-posting garbage — it's AI-assisted content creation with human oversight.

cta.title: Ready to build your AI store?
cta.subtitle: 30-minute call. We'll map out your store build — tech stack, AI content pipeline, tracking setup, timeline and price.
cta.fine: No commitment · You keep everything we build
